flags.concern: Step 6 removes `horizontalOffset` from `PaneControlTab`, but that offset is still needed to keep the top control tab centered over the editor pane after the pane itself shifts with side-pane margins.
flags.evidence: The plan explicitly says to remove `horizontalOffset` from `EditorPaneTab`. In the repo, `PaneControlTab` consumes that value at `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/components/PaneControlTab.tsx:91,136`, and the top-pane positioning strategy applies it via `translateX(${horizontalOffset / 2}px)` at `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/panePositioning/strategies/TopPaneStrategy.ts:7-15`. Since the control tab is a separate fixed element, switching the pane surface to margin-based offsets does not automatically move the tab with it.
